name: teach-me
description: Learning coach: turn LLM-era work and reading into observable understanding. Explicitly invoked via $teach-me (Codex) or /teach-me (Claude Code).

interface.shortDescription: Turn work and reading into observable understanding
interface.longDescription: An explicitly-invoked learning coach. Run $teach-me to debrief work you just did, or $teach-me <topic> to learn a subject to observable understanding. Includes resumable checkpoints.
